summary: Tested Kundenportal Module (v40) - All backend APIs (26/26 tests passed) and frontend UI working correctly. Portal CRUD, file upload, customer notes, admin notes, public portal access all functional.
seed_data_creation: Test portals created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kundenportal Module fully tested and working. Backend: All CRUD endpoints (/api/portals), file upload/delete, customer notes, admin notes, portal lookup, portal from customer (module_kunden), public portal verification all working. Frontend: Navigation via sidebar 'Kundenportale', portal list with status badges, create portal dialog with customer dropdown from /api/modules/kunden/data, portal detail view with message composer and file sections, toggle activate/deactivate, copy link, delete. Public portal at /portal/{token} shows login page without auth, after password entry shows customer view with notes and upload sections.

backend_apis.POST /api/portals: PASS - Creates portal with customer_name, email, password, weeks
backend_apis.POST /api/portals/from-customer/{id}: PASS - Creates portal from Kunden-Modul customer

frontend_features.navigation: PASS - 'Kundenportale' link in sidebar, navigates to /portals
frontend_features.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Noch keine Kundenportale erstellt' when empty
frontend_features.create_portal_dialog: PASS - Customer dropdown loads from /api/modules/kunden/data (6 options)
frontend_features.create_portal_form: PASS - All fields work (name, email, description, password, weeks, send email checkbox)
frontend_features.portal_list: PASS - Shows portals with status badges (Aktiv/Deaktiviert/Abgelaufen)
frontend_features.portal_card_actions: PASS - Copy link, toggle active, delete buttons work
frontend_features.portal_detail_view: PASS - Opens on card click, shows all info
frontend_features.portal_detail_url: PASS - Portal URL displayed with copy button
frontend_features.portal_detail_message_composer: PASS - Textbaustein search and message textarea
frontend_features.portal_detail_files: PASS - Kundenbilder and Ihre Dokumente sections
frontend_features.public_portal_login: PASS - /portal/{token} shows login page without auth
frontend_features.public_portal_authenticated: PASS - After login shows customer view
frontend_features.public_portal_notes: PASS - Note type buttons (Korrektur, Hinweis, Termin, Zusatzinfo)
frontend_features.public_portal_upload: PASS - Image upload area with description field

module_installation_verified.Navigation.jsx: PASS - 'Kundenportale' nav item with Share2 icon
